query:
INSERT INTO `community_channels` (`name`, `slug`, `description`, `icon`) VALUES
('General Chat', 'general', 'General member discussions and announcements', 'MessageCircle'),
('Ride Call-outs', 'rides', 'Organise impromptu rides and find riding partners', 'Bike'),
('Gear Buy/Sell/Trade', 'gear', 'Buy, sell, or trade cycling gear with fellow members', 'ShoppingBag');

INSERT INTO `events` (`title`, `description`, `category`, `location`, `startDate`, `endDate`, `maxAttendees`, `isFree`, `pointsReward`, `imageUrl`) VALUES
('Saturday Morning Group Ride', 'Join us for our signature Saturday morning ride. All paces welcome. Free espresso at the finish!', 'ride', 'The Wheelhouse, Calgary', DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY), 20, true, 100, NULL),
('Chain Maintenance Workshop', 'Learn how to properly clean, lube, and maintain your drivetrain. Hands-on session with our expert mechanics.', 'workshop', 'The Wheelhouse Workshop, Calgary', DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY), 10, true, 250, NULL),
('Members Appreciation Evening', 'An exclusive evening for all Wheelhouse members. Drinks, food, and great cycling conversation.', 'special', 'The Wheelhouse, Calgary', DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 14 DAY), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 14 DAY), 50, true, 500, NULL),
('Banff Gran Fondo Camp', 'Our flagship 3-day cycling camp in the Rockies. Includes guided rides, coaching, accommodation, and meals. Limited spots.', 'camp', 'Banff, Alberta', DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 33 DAY), 15, false, 1000, NULL),
('Sunday Espresso Ride', 'A relaxed 40km social ride finishing with espresso and pastries at the shop.', 'ride', 'The Wheelhouse, Calgary', DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 5 DAY), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 5 DAY), 25, true, 100, NULL),
('Bike Fit Fundamentals Workshop', 'Understanding the basics of bike fit. Learn how to optimise your position for comfort and performance.', 'workshop', 'The Wheelhouse, Calgary', DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 DAY), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 DAY), 8, true, 250, NULL),
('Kananaskis Summer Camp', 'A 2-day adventure camp in K-Country. Challenging routes, professional coaching, and unforgettable scenery.', 'camp', 'Kananaskis, Alberta', DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 45 DAY), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 46 DAY), 12, false, 1000, NULL);
